rulings.Case Title: NINA ZHIGADLO VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP et al

rulings.Case Title: AJLOUN ENTERPRISES, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. GLEN LEIS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 11, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT GLEN LEIS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. rulings.Case Title: MANFRED ANGSTENBERGER VS. ANNICA CARLIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 11, 2014, line 6. PLAINTIFF MANFRED ANGSTENBERGER's Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide responses without objections no later than June 13, 2014. Plaintiff shall personally serve the order no later than June 11, 2014. Sanction granted in the amount of $710. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LEONA T FONG VS. SERGIO SILVA LAINEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 11, 2014, line 7. DEFENDANTS SERGIO LAINEZ, MAGALY SILVA and PRISCILLA SILVA's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint DENIED. Plaintiff states a cause of action for Unlawful Detainer based on the Ellis Act. There is no ambiguity as to the date of withdrawal as prior attempts have been found non-compliant by this Court. The Notice of Termination of Tenancy clearly provides the date of withdrawal in accordance with the Ellis Act and Rent Ordinance provisions. The amount of demanded holdover damages is not uncertain. Whether this amount is proper not an issue to be decided on a Motion to Quash. = (501/REQ)
